title: The Divine Thread
subtitle: A Mythology Reimagined
description: An enchanting retelling of ancient mythology through the eyes of forgotten women, exploring themes of love, duty, and spiritual awakening in a modern context.
excerpt: In the hushed temples of ancient kingdoms, where gods walked among mortals, a young priestess discovers her destiny intertwined with divine purpose...

title: Echoes of the Soul
subtitle: Finding Home Within
description: A deeply personal spiritual journey that explores the connection between inner transformation and external reality, wrapped in a compelling narrative.
excerpt: When Arjun returns to his ancestral village, he realizes that the greatest journey is not geographical but spiritual...

title: The Goddess Within
subtitle: Stories of Divine Feminine Power
description: A collection of interconnected stories celebrating the power of the divine feminine through mythology, history, and contemporary narratives.
excerpt: From ancient queens to modern warriors, these stories reveal the eternal power of feminine consciousness...

title: Karma & Coffee
subtitle: Modern Tales of Ancient Wisdom
description: A delightful blend of contemporary urban life and timeless spiritual wisdom, perfect for readers seeking meaning in everyday moments.
excerpt: Meera never expected a chance encounter at a coffee shop would set her on a path of spiritual discovery...
